channel.title: Nanami Chrysler's Website
channel.description: A collection of Nanami Chrysler's work completed at her time at RPI, including labs from ITWS 1100.

item.title: Lab 01
item.description: In Lab 1, I established the foundational development environment. We configured file servers on Microsoft Azure, created GitHub accounts, and integrated our local machines with remote servers and repositories to enable version-controlled web development.

item.title: Lab 02
item.description: In Lab 2, I used HTML and CSS to create a resume. I also organized my local repository structures, and practiced committing, pushing, and deploying files from my local enviornment to the Azure web server using GitHub Desktop.

item.title: Lab 03
item.description: In Lab 3, I deisgned and deployed this website. I used HTMl and CSS to implement consistent navigation and layout elements that reflect my personal style. I also practiced good DevOps using Git branching, which allows developers to safely experiment with new changes without affecting the main version of their code.

item.title: Lab 04
item.description: In Lab 4, I created an RSS feed and Atom feed for my website. I developed a valid XML document containing links to labs and integrated the feed into my homepage.

item.title: Lab 05
item.description: In Lab 5, I built an interactive HTML form using JavaScript. I implemented input validation, dynamic text behavior, and user feedback alerts to improve usability.

item.title: Lab 06
item.description: In Lab 6, I practiced using jQuery to create dynamic web intereactions. I built interactive elements such as animated text, clickable lists, and a functional image gallery while learning how to use event delegation and DOM manipulation effectively.

item.title: Lab 07
item.description: In Lab 7, I created a prototype of the website I plan to create for my group project using Balsamiq. Prototypes are used to explore and test design ideas quickly and receive feedback. In this way, we can make edits based on what we can see in our prototype, rather than make edits as we create the final product.

item.title: Lab 08
item.description: In Lab 8, I created a JSON file for my labs. I used the AJAX method to read my JSON file and dynamically create my lab cards for my Labs landing page.
